message:
fix(codegen): Normalize eval() returns to PyValue and improve VM fallback

- Wrap eval() returns with runtime.PyValue.from() for type consistency
- Add proper try/catch handling for module-level and defer contexts
- Add collectNamesFromNode() helper for VM fallback variable tracking
- Fix inside_defer detection for proper error handling
- Improve function generator defer block handling

Tests passing: bool, float, format, fractions, keyword, longexp, softspace, syntax, unary
